channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: How IWD 2026 Pushes for Women's Empowerment and Equal Opportunity in Nigeria
item.description: The article talk about the 2026 International Women’s Day (IWD), wey hold for March 8, with the theme “Give to Gain.” The message dey clear: when society dey support women, everybody dey benefit. The ...

item.title: Team USA Defeats Dominican Republic 2-1 to Advance to 2026 World Baseball Classic Championship
item.description: In a highly anticipated semifinal matchup of the 2026 World Baseball Classic at loanDepot park in Miami on March 15, 2026, Team USA edged out the Dominican Republic with a 2-1 victory, securing their ...

item.title: NHMP launches formal inquiry into officers for alleged leniency to Mansoor Ali Khan over speeding incident
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The National Highway and Motorway Police (NHMP) has started a formal fact-finding inquiry into an incident involving a famous television anchor, Mansoor Ali Khan, who was allegedly allowed ...

item.title: Lok Sabha Rejects Motion to Remove Speaker Om Birla Amid Deep Political Divide
item.description: On 11 March 2026, a motion to remove Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla under Article 94(c) of the Constitution was rejected by voice vote, but the hostile debate beforehand widened the rift between the gover...

item.title: U.S. airline executives urge Congress to fund TSA and resolve government shutdown
item.description: Executives from ten major U.S. airlines and aviation companies have formally appealed to Congress to end the ongoing government shutdown that is disrupting air travel and causing financial hardship fo...

item.title: PNP monitors fuel stations amid possible hoarding and price manipulation
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) is closely monitoring gasoline stations that have abruptly stopped operations due to suspicions of hoarding or manipulating fuel prices. This move comes as global ...

item.title: UK government announces support package for households facing rising energy costs
item.description: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer has announced plans to provide financial support to the UK’s most vulnerable households amid rising energy prices linked to the conflict in the Middle East. At a press ...

item.title: COSOTA cautions public on illegal sharing of copyrighted works
item.description: Dar es Salaam – The Copyright Society of Tanzania (COSOTA) has issued a stern warning to the public that sharing music, films, books and other creative works on WhatsApp or social media without permis...

item.title: Highlights from Conan O’Brien’s Opening Monologue at the 2026 Oscars
item.description: At the 98th Academy Awards, Conan O’Brien delivered a sharp and humorous opening monologue that had the star-studded audience laughing throughout. Over almost 11 minutes, he made witty remarks about H...

item.title: Proposal to close kiosks over police extortion practices
item.description: The opinion piece calls for shutting down all kiosks across Kenya because they have become hubs for illegal rent collection by police officers. It argues that these small roadside businesses are often...

item.title: Highlights from the 2026 Oscars: Wins, Memorable Moments, and Celebrity Reactions
item.description: The 98th Academy Awards took place at the Dolby Theatre, featuring a mix of emotional tributes, unexpected wins, and memorable moments. Michael B. Jordan and Jessie Buckley celebrated their first Osca...

item.title: Timothée Chalamet Sparks Reactions With All-White Oscars Outfit
item.description: At the 2026 Oscars, Timothée Chalamet concluded his awards season campaign with one of the evening’s most talked-about ensembles. The 'Marty Supreme' star wore an all-white Givenchy suit featuring wid...

item.title: Canadian Paralympic Committee CEO highlights need for greater investment after Milano-Cortina Games

item.title: Lok Sabha and Rajya Sabha Begin Budget Session Amid Discussions on Grants and Conduct Issues
item.description: On Monday, March 16, 2026, the Indian Parliament reconvened for the Budget Session, following a week marked by political tensions, including the failed motion to remove Speaker Om Birla and protests b...

item.title: Trump Confirms Ongoing Talks with Cuba Amid Economic Concerns
item.description: US President Donald Trump on Sunday confirmed that discussions between the United States and Cuba are ongoing, with potential for a deal or other measures soon. Speaking to reporters on Air Force One,...

item.title: Etche Community Appeals for Revival of Abandoned Primary School
item.description: The Etche community for Rivers State don dey beg their Local Government Chairman, Hon. Njoku, to help bring life back to the Community Primary School Umuozoche for Igbodo area. The school don dey for ...

item.title: Tanzania Government Strengthens Cooperation With Religious Institutions for Moral and National Development
item.description: Tanzania Prime Minister, Dr Mwigulu Nchemba, announced that the government will continue cooperating closely with religious institutions to maintain peace, uphold moral values, and support national de...

item.title: Parents pursue legal action after toddler suffers birth-related injuries at Mowbray Maternity Hospital
item.description: Three-year-old Likothemba Ncapayi has already endured four surgeries and requires two more due to complications from a traumatic birth at Mowbray Maternity Hospital in Cape Town. Her left arm remains ...

item.title: Australian Economy Expected to Avoid Recession Despite Middle East Conflict; Rate Hike Possible
item.description: Treasurer Jim Chalmers has indicated that Australia is unlikely to experience a recession as a result of the ongoing conflict in the Middle East. Federal Treasury modelling suggests that while growth ...
